stem: A circle in the xy-plane has its center at (2, −3). Line t is tangent to this circle at the point (−1, 5). Which of the following points also lies on line t?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. The slope of the radius from (2, −3) to (−1, 5) is (5 − (−3))/(−1 − 2) = −8/3. The tangent at (−1, 5) is perpendicular, so it has slope 3/8. The line: y − 5 = (3/8)(x + 1). At x = 7: y = 5 + (3/8)(8) = 5 + 3 = 8. So (7, 8) lies on line t.

Choices A, B, and C do not satisfy the line's equation.
